calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-11-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jason Louie appeared by zoom for and with Pedro Caba (Petitioner) by zoom.

The Court noted that the $2,880.00 paid to the Attorney from escrow was not approved by the Court, and questions why Counsel did not immediately pay that money back to the estate. Mr. Louie stated that this was a property with five owners, that one owner was the Decedent and the other four are the Decedent's siblings who happen to be his Clients, and that he did not spot the escrow error until the Probate Examiner brought it to his attention. Mr. Louie also stated that escrow did not follow the instructions to pay out of the 80% of the property that went to the four other property owners, that it was a mistake and that he can put the money back in the estate. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.
